name: Slumber Beneath the Glacier
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: The Shield generated by the wielder +[StateArg1]%. After releasing the Posse, all Awakeners gain an additional [StateArg2]% Temporary Crit. Rate and Crit. DMG, but incur a {Sacrifice} of 3% of Max HP. If the current Realm is {Aequor}, releasing the Posse will also increase {Tentacle DMG} by [StateArg3]% of the wielder's Attack.
lore:
To await "that moment," the girl slept at the bottom of the glacier.

The deep ice of Elworth froze her body, but it failed to seal away her consciousness.

That wisp of consciousness belonged to a child—and a mother.

Within the dark womb of His daughter, the god dreamed an endless dream.

Over those twenty-five years, did she ever think, yearn, or hope for anything?

No one can answer these questions now.

As for the girl herself... will she open her heart to those around her?

Only time and the future will tell.
